animationTracks.purpose: Create subtle spatial motion behind the comparison panels.
Reveal the two comparison surfaces as the primary layout.
Slide in the baseline or before state.
Slide in the improved or after state.
Draw the visual boundary between the compared results.
Lift the winning result without overusing decorative badges.
Settle the comparison for review and handoff.
